title: Iranians Viewed by U.S. as Potential Leaders Died in Strikes, Trump Says
summary_full: With the future of Iran deeply uncertain, President Trump acknowledged that it could end up with a ruler “as bad” as Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.
summary_public: With the future of Iran deeply uncertain, President Trump acknowledged that it could end up with a ruler “as bad” as Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.
